title: villanova pratensis
intro: Villanova pratensis, also known as Wild Chamomile or Camomilla, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils, particularly chamazulene and bisabolol. Villanova pratensis offers various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, capsules, or essential oils, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
